ns0:entry.ns0:title: [swift] joewongjc/type4me
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/joewongjc/type4me
Language: swift
MacOS语音输入法，实时识别、大模型文本优化、全本地存储

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [javascript] zarazhangrui/follow-builders
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zarazhangrui/follow-builders
Language: javascript
AI builders digest — monitors top AI builders on X and YouTube podcasts, remixes their content into digestible summaries. Follow builders, not influencers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [kotlin] rikkahub/rikkahub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rikkahub/rikkahub
Language: kotlin
RikkaHub is an Android APP that supports for multiple LLM providers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
Language: c%23
OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [c#] velopack/velopack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/velopack/velopack
Language: c%23
Installer and automatic update framework for cross-platform desktop applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [qml] xarbit/plasma6-applet-appgrid
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xarbit/plasma6-applet-appgrid
Language: qml
AppGrid for Plasma is a modern alternative to Kickoff and Kicker. A grid launcher for KDE Plasma 6 — unified search, KRunner integration, animations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] facebookresearch/sam3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/sam3
Language: python
The repository provides code for running inference and finetuning with the Meta Segment Anything Model 3 (SAM 3), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [python] microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
Language: python
AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [clojure] twosigma/Cook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/twosigma/Cook
Language: clojure
Fair job scheduler on Kubernetes and Mesos for batch workloads and Spark

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [java] ArcadeData/arcadedb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArcadeData/arcadedb
Language: java
ArcadeDB Multi-Model Database, one DBMS that supports SQL, Cypher, Gremlin, HTTP/JSON, MongoDB and Redis. ArcadeDB is a conceptual fork of OrientDB, the first Multi-Model DBMS. ArcadeDB supports Vector Embeddings.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [vala] elementary/files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementary/files
Language: vala
File browser designed for elementary OS

Self-evolving memory OS for LLM & AI Agents: ultra-persistent memory, hybrid-retrieval, and cross-task skill reuse, with 35.24% token savings

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/phodal/routa

Workspace-first multi-agent coordination platform for AI development, with shared Specs, Kanban orchestration, and MCP/ACP/ A2A support across web and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [assembly] ajroetker/go-highway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ajroetker/go-highway
Language: assembly
Write SIMD once, run everywhere. AVX2, AVX-512, or pure Go fallback. Like Google Highway, but for Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] janavipandole/Cara
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/janavipandole/Cara
Language: html
E-Commerce Website is a modern, responsive, and fully functional online shopping platform built to deliver a smooth and user-friendly experience. This project allows users to browse products, add them to cart, and securely checkout. It features a clean UI, product search, categories, and order management.

🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活
